name: Cosplay RPG
description:
A massive open-world cosplay roleplay where you can do absolutely anything related to cosplay culture. Attend conventions, compete in contests, meet cosplayers, explore crowded convention halls, join fandom groups, create costumes, travel between events, make friends or rivals, work backstage, visit artist alleys, attend photoshoots, or simply wander through the world however you want.

The world is dynamic, immersive, and constantly alive with conventions, fandom communities, cosplay events, photographers, streamers, artists, vendors, and endless interactions. There is no fixed story or objective; the experience is entirely driven by your choices.

Be anyone you want:

• A beginner cosplayer

• A famous cosplay influencer

• A photographer

• A prop maker

• A convention staff member

• A judge

• A casual fan

• A streamer

• Or just someone exploring the cosplay scene

Every convention, city, fandom, and encounter can lead to new stories, friendships, drama, romance, chaos, or unforgettable moments.

Do whatever you want.
creator: Slavic1939
